description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow set within a walled property, featuring a flat roof with geometric skylights and a rooftop terrace. The main building is surrounded by landscaped gardens, palm trees, and decorative shrubbery, providing a lush, private environment. A large driveway leads to a double garage, while the rear of the property boasts two full-sized tennis courts with red playing surfaces. The bungalow's facade is characterized by large, rectangular windows and sliding glass doors, maximizing natural light and offering views of the grounds. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance. The property is enclosed by a low wall and fencing, ensuring privacy and security.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, rooftop terrace, landscaped gardens, and two tennis courts within a walled property. The design is clean and contemporary, with a spacious layout and lush surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, landscaped garden, and prominent windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis courts, side garden, and the length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis courts, backyard landscaping, and rear facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing both tennis courts, side garden, and the bungalow's flat roof features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
